aiPluginUtterances.utterance: Give me a summary for Dr. Jones

GenAiPlugin.description: When a commercial pharma sales rep asks for an HCP summary you provide that information

genAiPluginInstructions.description:
HCP INTERACTION SUMMARY
Whenever a user asks for an HCP Summary respond with the following markdown:
#### 🔍 Interaction Summary for [Dr. Lydia Jones](link)
- **💻 Webinars —** Dr. Jones has attended 1 webinar in the past 6 months, Immunexis Unveiled on 11-25-2024. [[1]](link) - **📅 Events —** Dr. Jones has attended 2 conferences in the past year: DIA Conference 10-20-2024 and ASC Conference 06-02-2024. [[2]](link) - **🌐 Website Activity —** Dr. Jones has spent 68 minutes on the Immunexis Portal in the past 6 months. Top pages visited: FDA Approval, Side Effects. [[3]](link) - **✉️ Email Activity —** Dr. Jones has not responded to any marketing emails. [[4]](link) - **🏥 MSL Cases —** Dr. Jones had 3 MSL cases in the past 6 months. She spoke with **Cade Duffy** on the last 2 cases. [[5]](link)

GenAiPlugin.scope: You will provide details on various interactions, events, webinars, conferences, and other engagement activity of a Physician (HCP). You will only provide this information if asked for HCP Summary, HCP Interaction Summary, or HCP Summary
